steps.t: The tavern keep is in the cellar of Thorin's Hall. You should collect a small beer from Thorin's Hall's inn, and then deliver it to Wald Mugwort under…
Wald Mugwort is at Ost Haer in the Lone-lands. You should bring the fake Thistlebelly Brew to Wald Mugwort. You will trick him with this, for it is ac…
